landing.why_cp_intro: Our pooled purchasing platform becomes Communityplace: a cooperative marketplace where the community is the strength. Same SSE mission, same shared governance — a name that finally says what we are.
landing.why_cp_card1_desc: A community of professional buyers, local producers and LOLODRIVE relays pooling their volumes to get better prices.
landing.why_cp_card2_desc: A single marketplace for the overseas territories: B2B catalogue, Cost-of-Living PASS, short circuits and pooled structural prices.
landing.why_cp_card3_desc: 1 person = 1 vote. SSE governance, capped margins and profits redistributed to support local purchasing power.
landing.hero_h1: The cooperative ecosystem of the overseas territories
landing.hero_subtitle: Cost-of-Living PASS, LOLODRIVE network, SSE governance — making essentials accessible to everyone.
landing.official_statement: Under the KDMARCHE – O'SCOP partnership, KDMARCHE sells products to end users, while O'SCOP organizes cooperative access to pooled economic conditions. Prices fall within a cooperative pooling framework, based on the collective aggregation of volumes, contributions and associated services, not on individualized commercial discounts.
landing.il_ne_s_agit: These are neither discounts nor promotions, but prices resulting from SSE pooling.
landing.conditions_d_acces_au: Access conditions to the cooperative pooled purchasing scheme
landing.acces_conditions_prefix: Access to the pooled economic conditions offered by
landing.est_reserve_aux_membres: is restricted to members holding an
compliance_excluded: No selling at a loss (KDMARCHE prices economically justified)
landing.contactez_nous_pour_rejoindre: Contact us to join the SSE Communityplace
landing.lolodrive_desc_mid: is KDMARCHÉ's local cooperative network: drive pickup, local delivery, merchant relays and field POS.
landing.lolodrive_desc_suffix: to activate your Cost-of-Living PASS on site.
landing.vous_serez_redirige_vers: You will be redirected to PASS registration; this relay will be pre-selected as your pickup point.
landing.api_p1_prefix: API scheme restricted to professional members: benefit from
landing.api_p1_suffix: to selected products and solutions, with economic conditions stemming from the network's collective strength.
landing.api_p2: B2B2C cooperative framework — the associated economic conditions result from the collective pooling of the network's volumes, contributions and services.
landing.api_p2_em: These are neither discounts nor promotions, but structural conditions.

partners.title: Strict separation of functions
partners.subtitle: One sells the products (KDMARCHE) • The other sells nothing (O'SCOP)
partners.note: This separation is deliberate, contractual and enforceable.
partners.oscop_role: Cooperative hub for SSE engineering, access and pooling
kdm_responsibilities: Responsible for product compliance (VAT, customs, expiry, traceability)
oscop_responsibilities: Guarantor of the SSE cooperative framework

contact.message_placeholder: Describe your activity, needs and questions...
contact.disclaimer: By submitting this form, you agree to be contacted by our sales team.
contact.sent_desc: We have received your quote request. Our team will contact you shortly.

offers.accedez_aux_prix_structurels: Access pooled structural B2B prices via KDMARCHE
offers.choisissez_la_formule: Choose the right plan to access pooled structural prices
offers.credits_financent_detail: Credits fund intensive usage, priority access, additional zones and SSE services.
offers.credits_warning: ⚠️ Credits never affect the price of products sold by KDMARCHE.
offers.n_impactent_jamais: They never affect the price of products sold by KDMARCHE.
offers.pret_a_rejoindre: Ready to join the SSE Communityplace?
offers.beneficiez_de_prix_structurels: Benefit from structural B2B prices up to -50%
features_ess_acces_pro: Access to the KDMARCHE B2B Communityplace

pricing.acces_a_la_centrale: Access to the KDMARCHE B2B Communityplace
pricing.choisissez_votre_acces_a: Choose your access to the Hub: pooled structural B2B prices via KDMARCHE, within a B2B2C cooperative framework for professional members.
pricing.puis_je_changer_de: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.oui_changement_de_formule: Yes, you can change plans every month. The price difference is prorated and charged to the credits wallet.
pricing.qui_peut_adherer_answer: Any professional structure (business registration required): cooperatives, SSE associations, SMEs, artisans, restaurateurs, grocers, local authorities.
pricing.comment_answer: Prices result from the members' collective strength: aggregated volumes, contributions and pooled network services. These are neither discounts nor promotions, but structural economic conditions.
pricing.inclut_volume: Includes everything in ESS ACCÈS PRO
pricing.inclut_impact: Includes everything in ESS VOLUME PRO

logiscop.hero_desc: The logistics arm of the cooperative network. Pooled flows, cost optimization, sea/air reliability — serving the Cost-of-Living PASS.
logiscop.agregation_des_commandes_cooperatives: Aggregation of cooperative orders across the 4 overseas territories. Pooled sea containerization.
logiscop.liaison_maritime_antilles_reunion: Sea route (Antilles, Réunion) or air route (French Guiana). Real-time tracking via the LOGI'SCOP API.
logiscop.livraison_directe_aux_relais: Direct delivery to cooperative LOLODRIVE relays. Drive pickup or local delivery by O'SCOP.

oscop.hero_desc: the cooperative organizing solidarity-based access to essentials in the French overseas territories.
oscop.hero_quote: "1 person = 1 vote" — governance shared by co-op members, capped margins, profits redistributed to support local purchasing power.
oscop.achats_groupes_negociation_collective: Group purchasing, collective bargaining, price caps on the 25 Cost-of-Living PASS essentials. No speculative margin.
oscop.chaque_cooperateur_dispose_d: Each member has an equal vote — decisions made in assembly, transparent accounts, democratic redistribution.
oscop.producteurs_locaux_prioritaires_relais: Priority to local producers, paid merchant cooperative relays (capped commissions), public SSE reporting.
oscop.voir_l_impact_ess: See SSE impact in real time
oscop.tableaux_de_bord_ouverts: Open dashboards: volumes, redistributions, caps upheld.

catalog.les_prix_ne_sont: Prices are not visible. Your organization must be approved and hold an active subscription.
catalog.toast_prix_indispo: Price not available for your organization

seo.landing_title: KDMARCHÉ — The cooperative ecosystem of the overseas territories
seo.landing_desc: B2B2C cooperative Communityplace: Cost-of-Living PASS, LOLODRIVE network, pooled structural prices and SSE governance in the French overseas territories.
seo.pricing_desc: Choose your access to the hub: pooled structural B2B prices via KDMARCHE, no long-term commitment.
seo.offers_desc: O'SCOP subscriptions and credits wallet: access structural B2B prices up to -50%.
seo.logiscop_desc: The logistics arm of the cooperative network: consolidation, sea/air shipping and relay distribution in the overseas territories.
seo.oscop_desc: The cooperative organizing solidarity-based access to essentials: 1 person = 1 vote, capped margins, territorial impact.

onb.subtitle: Secure payment · Tripartite agreement signed online · Immediate activation
onb.vendor_desc: I offer my products to the hub and grow my B2B sales.
onb.buyer_desc: I buy at pooled prices and access the B2B hub.
onb.pay_note: Secure Stripe payment. After payment, you will electronically sign the O'SCOP × KDMARCHE × Supplier tripartite agreement.
onb.conv_intro: Your agreement is pre-filled with your information. Complete the missing fields:
onb.sign_intro: Review your agreement filled with your information, then sign electronically:
onb.lu_approuve: "Read and approved" — I acknowledge having read the entire V1.5 tripartite framework agreement and accept it. The electronic signature is equivalent to a handwritten signature (art. 1366-1367 French Civil Code).
onb.done_email: An activation email has just been sent to you with your signed agreement attached.
onb.done_note: Click the activation link to choose your password and access your space.
onb.act_subtitle: Choose your password to finalize your membership.
